specs.key_requirements: Add `check-alignment [path]` subcommand to the `cclab sdd` command tree. Add CLI→Logic mapping row: `sdd check-alignment [path]` → `check_alignment::run()`.

Defines the sibling validate-spec-structure CLI command pattern — --json flag, ValidationViolation schema (kind + path fields), hard-error exit non-zero on any violation. check-alignment follows the same pattern.

Section type system: 17 section types with type→lang mapping (state-machine→mermaid, logic→mermaid, cli→yaml, config→json, rpc-api→json, changes→yaml). Section annotation format: `<!-- type: X lang: Y -->`. overview/requirements/scenarios sections do NOT require code blocks.
CLI as the sole execution path — new commands are standalone subcommands.
Related spec validator: checks required diagrams/api-spec by spec_type. check-alignment Phase 1 is section-level block presence — complementary concern.
Severity model (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW) and validation pipeline pattern for reference.
Confirms check-alignment is a standalone CLI command not coupled to workflow state machine.
